description: Trigger.dev is an open source platform for durable background jobs, AI agents, and long-running workflows written in TypeScript. It can be used via Trigger.dev Cloud or self-hosted, and includes task execution, realtime updates, and observability features.
summary: Trigger.dev exposes a REST Management API, a separate Realtime HTTP API, an MCP server launched via `npx trigger.dev@latest mcp`, and an npm-distributed CLI.
